headline: UST Acquires Award-Winning Workday Partner Intecrowd
summary: ALISO VIEJO, Calif., April 07, 2026--UST has acquired Intecrowd LLC (Intecrowd), a Workday Partner specializing in strategic deployments and full lifecycle support for Workday solutions.

headline: Opkey Research Exposes the Cloud Velocity Crisis: Enterprises Struggle to Keep Up with Pace of Change
